metadata.title: PROVEN — The truth is proven.
metadata.description: 1v1 prediction challenges settled by AI. No referees. No arguments. PROVEN decides.

footer.creditLine: © 2026 PROVEN. All rights reserved. Powered by GenLayer AI Consensus

home.tagline: The truth is proven. Create the first VS.
home.emptyHeroSubtitle: AI finds the proof. Winner gets paid instantly. Decentralized resolution for the bold.
home.archiveLead: A live index of challenges settling on PROVEN—staked terms, challenger liquidity, and AI-assisted resolution anchored to verifiable proof. Precision without the noise.
home.archiveGlassHeadline: Validators align on explicit sources and settlement rules. When the outcome is provable, the protocol executes payouts—no referees, no appeal loop.
home.archiveDemo2Title: Major LLM ships native multi-agent tooling
home.archiveDemo3Title: Western finals close in six games or fewer
home.arenaSubtitleFallback: Open challenges are scarce right now. Explore recent arena examples.
home.manifestTitle: Truth resolves disputes. Code enforces outcomes.
home.manifestSubtitle: No referees, no endless arguments, no manual arbitration. The protocol verifies evidence and settles with finality.
home.manifestPillar1Body: No single authority decides your result. Consensus and verifiable inputs drive the outcome.
home.manifestPillar2Body: Outcomes are tied to explicit terms and proof sources, not opinion battles after the fact.
home.manifestPillar3Body: When conditions resolve, settlement executes immediately and payouts are distributed automatically.

create.sendThisLink: Send this link to your rival.
create.sendThisPrivateLink: Send this private link only to the people you want to invite.
create.creatorRoleRequired: Switch the demo role to Creator before publishing a challenge.
create.submittedPending: Transaction submitted to Bradbury. It may take a moment to appear.
create.invalidStake: Stake must be greater than zero
create.rematchHint: The original terms have been prefilled. Adjust anything before publishing the rematch.
create.rematchPending: We will reuse the prior market terms once the original claim loads.
create.advancedHint: Use this for custom odds, handicap lines, special settlement rules, or 1-v-many formats.
create.visibilityPublicHint: Anyone can discover this challenge in the public arena and join it.
create.visibilityPrivateHint: Hide this challenge from public feeds and share the invite link directly.
create.slotsHelp: Set this above 1 to open the claim to several challengers.
create.fixedOddsHint: Example: 1.80 means a 1 stake returns 1.8 total if challengers win.
create.fixedOddsPreview: Current preview: {amount} GEN returned on a winning challenger bet.
create.settlementPlaceholder: Tell PROVEN exactly how this claim should be judged.
create.settlementRuleHint: Add custom judging instructions when the market needs more than the raw question text.
create.pageSubtitle: Define your claim. Lock your stake. Let the protocol decide.
create.demoModeHint: Demo mode uses hosted Bradbury signers so the flow stays reliable even if browser wallets are unstable.
create.invalidStakeMin: Stake must be at least {amount} GEN
create.sourceRequired: Add a real verification source before publishing
create.settlementRuleRequired: Add a settlement rule for custom or advanced markets
create.minimumStakeHint: Minimum stake for the demo is {amount} GEN.
create.qualityReady: This claim looks specific enough for the current demo rules.
create.qualitySpecificity: Make the question more specific so the outcome is easy to verify from one source.
create.qualitySource: Use a concrete source page instead of leaving the verification source empty or generic.
create.qualitySettlement: Advanced and custom markets should include an explicit settlement rule.

deportes.sourceHint: Use the official match, league, or scoreboard page for the exact event you want to settle.
deportes.questionHint: Name the teams, competition, and timeframe directly in the claim.
deportes.settlementTemplate: Resolve this against the official final result of the linked event. State whether extra time, penalties, or overtime count.

clima.sourceHint: Use a weather source that clearly names the location and date being measured.
clima.questionHint: Name the city or region and the exact day being judged.
clima.settlementTemplate: Resolve this using the weather reported for the named location and date on the linked source. Use the exact precipitation or temperature condition written here.

crypto.sourceHint: Use a price page that will still show the asset and quoted value at settlement time.
crypto.questionHint: Name the asset, threshold, and deadline explicitly.
crypto.settlementTemplate: Resolve this using the visible spot price on the linked source at the deadline time. Apply any threshold or line exactly as written.

cultura.sourceHint: Prefer the official publication, awards page, or primary entertainment source behind the claim.
cultura.questionHint: Anchor the claim to a concrete release, award, ranking, or publication event.
cultura.settlementTemplate: Resolve this only from the linked official or authoritative source. Do not infer beyond the exact published result.

custom.sourceHint: Custom claims need a very specific source and a clear settlement rule to be demo-safe.
custom.questionHint: Make the outcome measurable and easy to verify from one source.
custom.settlementTemplate: Resolve this exactly as written using the linked source only. If the wording or source is ambiguous, mark it unresolvable.

explore.title: Open VS
explore.subtitle: Accept someone's VS. Pick your fight.
explore.noResultsDesc: Try changing the filters or create your own VS.
explore.sampleIntroEmpty: No open VS on-chain yet. Demo cards below follow your filters and search.
explore.sampleIntroFiltered: No live VS match your filters. Demo cards below use the same filters and search.
explore.sampleNoMatchIntro: Nothing matches these filters — not even the demos. Try resetting or broadening your search.
explore.sampleNoMatchHint: No demo card matches the current filters. Reset filters or adjust search to see examples again.
explore.sampleCreateHint: Create your own challenge to go live on the protocol.
explore.filtersAriaLabel: Filters: category, minimum stake, and sort order

dashboard.title: My VS
dashboard.connectDesc: Connect your wallet to see your VS.

vsDetail.subtitle: Challenge details, stake terms, and autonomous resolution in real time.
vsDetail.creator: Creator
vsDetail.marketTermsHint: These are the exact rules and economics encoded in the contract.
vsDetail.joinedToast: Joined with {amount} GEN. Total pool now {total} GEN.
vsDetail.challengeStakeHintFixed: At the current fixed odds, a winning challenger bet returns {payout} GEN.
vsDetail.challengeStakeHintPool: Pool odds split creator stake proportionally across the challenger side.
vsDetail.challengeStakeHintHeadToHead: Use any valid stake size your wallet can fund.
vsDetail.privateInviteHint: You need the creator's private invite link to view and join this challenge.
vsDetail.rivalryHint: Every rematch in this rivalry is linked onchain through parent claims.
vsDetail.rivalryEmpty: No rematches yet. Settle this round, then launch the next one.
vsDetail.privateLinkUnavailable: This private invite link is not available on this device. Open the original invite link again to copy it.
vsDetail.challengeUnavailable: This challenge is no longer open for staking on the current contract.
vsDetail.submittedPending: Transaction submitted to Bradbury. The arena will refresh automatically.
vsDetail.demoModeHint: Demo mode routes writes through hosted Bradbury signers so judges can see the full flow without flaky browser wallet behavior.
vsDetail.sendLink: Send this link to your rival
vsDetail.sampleMode: Preview challenge: this is a sample arena card. Create a real VS to interact onchain.
vsDetail.invalidChallengeStakeMin: Enter a stake of at least {amount} GEN
vsDetail.minimumStakeHint: Minimum stake for the demo is {amount} GEN.

xmtpVs.title: VS chat (XMTP)
xmtpVs.needsAccepted: Private chat between players unlocks once the VS is accepted (1v1).
xmtpVs.needsWallet: Connect your wallet to open an encrypted DM with your rival on XMTP.
xmtpVs.participantOnly: Only the creator and the rival can use this chat.
xmtpVs.peerUnreachable: This address is not reachable on the XMTP network yet (your rival may need to connect once in any XMTP app).
xmtpVs.rateLimited: XMTP is temporarily limiting requests. Wait a moment and tap Refresh.
xmtpVs.networkError: Network issue while syncing messages. Check your connection and try Refresh.
xmtpVs.errorGeneric: Could not open chat. Try again.
xmtpVs.disclaimer: Messages are delivered over XMTP (E2E encrypted). They are not stored on PROVEN servers.

messagesHub.title: Messages
messagesHub.subtitle: Encrypted 1v1 threads tied to your accepted duels. No global inbox — only rivals you’re matched with.
messagesHub.connectDesc: Your duel list and XMTP threads load from your wallet address.
messagesHub.featureOffTitle: Messaging is off in this build
messagesHub.featureOffDesc: Enable NEXT_PUBLIC_FEATURE_XMTP in .env.local and restart the dev server. See docs/xmtp-integration.md.
messagesHub.loadError: Could not load your VS list. Check your connection and try again.
messagesHub.noParticipationDesc: Join or create a VS to appear here. Private XMTP chat unlocks once a duel is accepted 1v1.
messagesHub.hubDisabledDesc: You’re in one or more duels, but XMTP chat only opens for accepted 1v1 matches. Open a VS below for status.

reason.sample: Demo VS — chat only on real on-chain duels.
reason.not_accepted: Chat unlocks when the VS is accepted.
reason.waiting_opponent: Waiting for a fixed rival before DM opens.
reason.multi_challenger: Multi-challenger VS — XMTP is 1v1 only for now.
